challenge.explanation: Ispod naslova sekcije What you'll learn ovog brošure, pronaći ćete spisak tema o kojima će kurs razgovarati i učenje. Proverite tu listu i potražite odgovore za stvari koje nisu deo te liste.
challenge.instructions: Pročitajte tekst i odgovorite na pitanje koje je navedeno/nalazi se ispod.

questions.text:
Nakon razgovora sa Brajonom, Lisa je osećala da bi trebalo da pohađa kurs o rešavanju konflikata na poslu. Evo letaka za kurs koji je dobila:

Mastering Conflict Resolution in the Workplace

- Find the Right Balance Between Debate & Progress!

Are disagreements slowing your team down? Do you struggle to meet deadlines because discussions go in circles? Healthy debate is valuable, but too much disagreement can stop real progress. Learn how to balance different perspectives while keeping projects on track!

What you'll learn:

> How to encourage productive discussions without delaying work

> Strategies for listening to feedback while staying focused

> The importance of making sure everyone feels heard and valued

> How to handle strong opinions and find common ground

> Techniques to work together efficiently and meet deadlines

Next session: [March 20th]

Location: [Online]

Perfect for: Team leaders, managers, and professionals who want to improve team dynamics

Don't let too much debate slow you down! Learn how to keep discussions focused and your team motivated.

Sign up today! [conflict_solvers@moogle.com]

Koji od ovih stvari nije pomenuto u brošuri kao nešto što ćete naučiti na kursu?

answers.feedback: To je jedna od stvari pomenutih u brošuri.

answers.answer: Kako se nositi sa oštrim komentarima i postići konsenzus
answers.feedback: Ova stavka je na listi What you'll learn.

answers.answer: Značaj osiguravanja da se svako oseća saslušano i cenjeno
answers.feedback: Ova stavka se nalazi na spisku What you'll learn.

challenge.title: Vežba 69
